benefits.description: Tendon nodule at base of middle finger in palm essentially disappeared after 3 weeks of KLOW use. Nodule had persisted for 1.5 years despite cortisone injection treatment.
Reduction in pain and discomfort associated with tendon nodule

protocol_notes: Used almost daily for 3 weeks with a few missed days. Subq injection. User explicitly notes correlation is not causation and that natural resolution or delayed cortisone effect cannot be ruled out. Previous cortisone injection provided 1-2 months of relief about 1 year prior. Surgery was being considered as treatment trajectory.
